name: amazon sellers processing 10–20 contracts/month tool
description: For amazon sellers processing 10–20 contracts/month, missed renewal reminders cause supplier penalties. We provide automated reminders instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Difficulty in tracking contract expiration dates and renewal reminders leads to missed opportunities and potential penalties.
